testsuite.name: TestParser
testsuite.system-out: Token à Parser : TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,INT,0,1,> TOKEN<IDENTIFIANT,x,0,5,> TOKEN<EGAL_ASSIGNATION,=,0,7,> TOKEN<PARENTHESE_GAUCHE,(,0,9,> TOKEN<INT,1,0,10,> TOKEN<PLUS,+,0,12,> TOKEN<INT,2,0,14,> TOKEN<PARENTHESE_DROITE,),0,15,> TOKEN<MULTIPLICATION,*,0,17,> TOKEN<INT,3,0,19,> VarDeclStmt Type(INT) Identifier(x) AssignmentOperator(=) ExprBinaire ExprBinaire IntLiteral(1) OperatorCalcul + IntLiteral(2) OperatorCalcul * IntLiteral(3)
